name: Uroboros Shield
description: Among the brotherhoods created after the dissolution of the Triune Hand Order, the Brotherhood of Ouroboros is the most secretive and mysterious one. Its symbol has a plethora of interpretations: the most popular one is a righteous death followed by a rebirth.
descriptionZh: 三手会解散之后出现了诸多兄弟会，其中数衔尾蛇兄弟会最为神秘。这个组织的标志存在多种解读，最常见的一种认为表示人若死得其所，就能重生。
